violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. Handle for the scoop in the ice bin was found in contact with the ice. Handles should be stored with handles upright, out of the product being served.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of the microwave was found dirty during inspection. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Rotini pasta salad was found in the reach-in refrigerator near oven without a date marking. Potentially hazardous foods should be dated with either the preparation or discard date to assure proper disposal.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
